title: Lead SEO Specialist at Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Join the Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a SEO Specialist in Ludhiana. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rapido Consulting Pvt Ltd!
